code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut has = false
  mut neg = false
  mut cur = 0
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 45 and not has
      neg = true
    else if b >= 48 and b <= 57
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
      has = true
    else
      if has
        if neg
          nums = list.push(nums, 0 - cur)
        else
          nums = list.push(nums, cur)
        end
        cur = 0
        has = false
        neg = false
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if has
    if neg
      nums = list.push(nums, 0 - cur)
    else
      nums = list.push(nums, cur)
    end
  end
  nums
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let nums = parse_ints(line1)
let target = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
when Some(v)
  v
when None
  0
end

let total = nums.len()
mut found = false
mut fi = 0
mut fj = 0
mut i = 0
while i < total and not found
  mut j = i + 1
  while j < total and not found
    let a = match nums.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    let b = match nums.get(j)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if a + b == target
      fi = i
      fj = j
      found = true
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if found
  print("found=#{fi},#{fj}")
else
  print("none")
end
